Test Description: Reads all defined DMAC registers to verify default values; then writes six data patterns to writable registers and verifies reads against mask-based expected values; aggregates failure counts and finishes with pass/fail.
Remarks: Reads/writes skipped for addresses as directed by read/write masks or skip_array entries.
Test Steps / Procedure:
Entry point: test_case().
1) CALL chk_rst_val().
   1.1) Loop i=0..CNT-1: addr = addr_array[i].
   1.2) If read_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: SKIP reading this address.
   1.3) READ data_rd = read_reg(addr).
   1.4) IF (data_rd == default_value_array[i]) then PASS message (under DEBUG_DISPLAY); ELSE def_fail_cnt++.
2) CALL chk_rd_wr().
   2.1) Define chk_val[6] = {0xffffffff, 0xaaaaaaaa, 0x55555555, 0x00000000, 0xA5A5A5A5, 0xffff0000}.
   2.2) For each j=0..5 (pattern): set data_wr = chk_val[j].
   2.3) Writing phase: For i=0..CNT-1: addr = addr_array[i].
        - If skip_array[i] == 1: continue.
        - If write_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: continue.
        - Else: WRITE write_reg(addr, data_wr).
   2.4) Reading/verify phase: For i=0..CNT-1: addr = addr_array[i].
        - If skip_array[i] == 1: continue.
        - If write_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: continue.
        - If read_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: continue.
        - Else: READ data_rd = read_reg(addr). Compute wr_n = (write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff). Compute exp_val = ((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])). IF (data_rd == exp_val) then PASS message (under DEBUG_DISPLAY); ELSE wr_fail_cnt++.
3) Finalize: IF (def_fail_cnt > 0 || wr_fail_cnt > 0) then CALL finish(1) else CALL finish(0).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Default value check (chk_rst_val): PASS if (read_reg(addr_array[i]) == default_value_array[i]) when read_mask_array[i] != 0; else increment def_fail_cnt.\nWrite-read check (chk_rd_wr): For each pattern j and each i not skipped and with write_mask_array[i] != 0 and read_mask_array[i] != 0: PASS if (read_reg(addr_array[i]) == ((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | ((write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff) & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i]))); else increment wr_fail_cnt.\nFinal result: PASS if (def_fail_cnt == 0 && wr_fail_cnt == 0) leading to finish(0); FAIL otherwise leading to finish(1).
